channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BAJAJCON*] BCCL-VPCL Scheme of Arrangement Effective May 1, 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Bajaj Consumer Care Ltd (BCCL) announced the effectiveness of its Scheme of Arrangement with Vishal Personal Care Limited (VPCL). The company received the certified NCLT order sanctioning the scheme on April 22, 2026. Following a Board resolution on April 29, 2026, BCCL filed the necessary documents with the Registrar of Companies, Jaipur, making the scheme effective from May 1, 2026. This corporate restructuring involves VPCL as the Demerged Company and BCCL as the Resulting Company, pursuant to Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013.

  • NCLT order sanctioning the Scheme of Arrangement received.
  • Board approved filing for scheme effectiveness on April 29, 2026.
  • Scheme of Arrangement effective from May 1, 2026.
  • Involves Vishal Personal Care and Bajaj Consumer Care.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bajaj Consumer Care Ltd | Category: Merger

item.title: [RECLTD] REC: Rajiv Ranjan Jha ceases to be Director
item.description:
REC Ltd announced a change in its Board of Directors. Shri Rajiv Ranjan Jha, who served as a Nominee Director representing Power Finance Corporation Limited (PFC), has ceased to be a Director of REC. This change is effective from May 1, 2026, following his superannuation from PFC services on April 30, 2026. The intimation was made in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Shri Rajiv Ranjan Jha ceased to be a Director of REC.
  • His directorship ended effective May 1, 2026.
  • The change is due to his superannuation from PFC services.
  • He was a Nominee Director from Power Finance Corporation Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: REC Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [ONGC] ONGC: Finance Director & CFO Tongaonkar to retire May 2026
item.description:
Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd (ONGC) announced that Shri Vivek Chandrakant Tongaonkar (DIN: 10143854) will cease to hold the positions of Director (Finance) and Chief Financial Officer (CFO) of the company. His departure is effective from May 1, 2026, upon his attainment of the age of superannuation. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015. The company will need to initiate a process to identify and appoint a successor for these critical financial leadership roles.

  • Shri Vivek Chandrakant Tongaonkar will cease as ONGC's Director (Finance) and CFO.
  • His retirement is effective from May 1, 2026, due to superannuation.
  • ONGC will need to appoint a successor for the key financial roles.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [JMFINANCIL] JM Financial: Gagan Kothari ceases as SMP, transfers to subsidiary
item.description:
JM Financial Ltd announced that Mr. Gagan Kothari will cease to be a Senior Management Person (SMP) of the company, effective May 1, 2026. This change is a result of an internal transfer to JM Financial Services Limited (JMFSL), a wholly-owned subsidiary of JM Financial. Mr. Kothari previously held the position of Executive Director & Chief Operating Officer - Integrated Investment Bank. The intimation was made under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations.

  • Gagan Kothari ceases as Senior Management Person at JM Financial.
  • Cessation is effective May 1, 2026, due to internal transfer.
  • He moves to JM Financial Services, a wholly-owned subsidiary.
  • Kothari was Executive Director & COO of Integrated Investment Bank.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JM FINANCIAL LTD.-$ | Category: Management Change

item.title: [ONGC] ONGC: Senior Management Changes Effective 01.05.2026
item.description:
Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd (ONGC) announced changes in its senior management, effective May 1, 2026. Rajan Asthana and Shibu Augustine Manuel, both Executive Directors, will superannuate from their positions.

  • Senior management changes at ONGC effective May 1, 2026.
  • Rajan Asthana, Executive Director, to superannuate.
  • Shibu Augustine Manuel, Executive Director, to superannuate.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [ATULAUTO] Atul Auto Apr'26 Sales: Domestic + Export up 73.97% YoY
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Atul Auto Ltd. reported its sales performance for April 2026. The company's domestic and export sales of three-wheeler vehicles increased by 73.97% year-over-year, with total sales reaching 3,001 units in April 2026 compared to 1,725 units in April 2025. Domestic sales alone increased by 73.65% YoY. The sales include EV L5 category vehicles sold by Atul Greentech Private Limited, a subsidiary of Atul Auto, until January 14, 2026.

  • Atul Auto's total 3-wheeler sales (domestic + export) grew by 73.97% YoY in April 2026.
  • Domestic 3-wheeler sales increased by 73.65% YoY in April 2026.
  • IC Engine 3-wheeler sales (domestic + export) increased by 94.78% YoY.
  • EV sales (domestic + export) increased by 27.93% YoY.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ATUL AUTO LTD.-$ | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [HINDPETRO] HPCL Announces Senior Management Changes, Effective May 1, 2026
item.description:
Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Ltd (HPCL) has announced changes in its Senior Management Team, effective May 1, 2026. Shri Krushna Mahapatra, Chief Risk Officer & Addl Charge of IFS, will superannuate. Shri Sitaram G Taparia has been designated as the Chief Risk Officer. These changes are in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Shri Krushna Mahapatra to superannuate from the position of Chief Risk Officer & Addl Charge of IFS.
  • Shri Sitaram G Taparia designated as the new Chief Risk Officer, effective May 1, 2026.
  • The changes are in accordance with SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HINDUSTAN PETROLEUM CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [FLUIDOM] Fluidomat re-appoints Kunal Jain as Executive Director for 3 years
item.description:
Fluidomat Ltd has announced the re-appointment of Shri Kunal Jain as the Whole-Time Director, designated as Executive Director, for a further period of three years, effective from May 1, 2026. This re-appointment was previously approved by the company's members at their 49th Annual General Meeting held on September 26, 2025. Shri Kunal Jain (DIN: 01475424) holds a B.Com degree and possesses 24 years of experience in commercial matters and industrial management. He also holds a directorship in Red Wood Packaging Private Limited. The company disclosed that Shri Kunal Jain is the son of Shri Ashok Jain, the Chairman & Managing Director, and the brother of Mrs. Radhica Sharma, the Deputy Managing Director.

  • Kunal Jain re-appointed as Whole-Time Director (Executive Director).
  • The re-appointment is for a further period of 3 years.
  • New term commences from May 1, 2026.
  • Shareholders approved the re-appointment at the 49th AGM.
  • He is related to the Chairman and Deputy Managing Director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FLUIDOMAT LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [CRSTCHM] Crestchem: Escrow Payment Mechanism Not Applicable
item.description:
Crestchem Ltd clarifies that the Escrow Payment Mechanism is not applicable to the company. The company states that it does not have a No Lien escrow account, Interest Payment Account, Sinking Fund Account, or General Account. This information is provided for record purposes.

  • Escrow Payment Mechanism is not applicable to Crestchem Ltd.
  • Crestchem does not maintain a No Lien escrow account.
  • Company does not have an Interest Payment Account.
  • There is no Sinking Fund Account for Crestchem.
  • Crestchem does not have a General Account.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CRESTCHEM LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [BHARATCOAL] BCCL: Niladri Roy Relinquishes Director (Technical) Charge
item.description:
Shri Niladri Roy has relinquished the additional charge of Director (Technical) Project & Planning at Bharat Coking Coal Ltd (BCCL) effective April 30, 2026, upon reaching superannuation. Consequently, he ceases to be a Director/KMP of Bharat Coking Coal Limited. This change is in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (LoDR) Regulations 2015 and SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD- POD2/I/3762/2026.

  • Niladri Roy relinquished Director (Technical) charge at BCCL.
  • Cessation effective April 30, 2026, due to superannuation.
  • Roy ceases to be a Director/KMP of Bharat Coking Coal Limited.
  • Complies with SEBI (LoDR) Regulations 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bharat Coking Coal Ltd | Category: Management Change
